title: Harmonica
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Harmonicas''' were [[Music/Legends|musical]] instruments. They produced sound by air being blown into or across them. [[Jawa/Legends|Jawas]] couldn't stand their sound.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|2|Stop That Jawa!}} {{Mo}}

*<!-- 1995-12-11 -->''[[Heroes & Rogues]]''
